description: HITL OIDC JWT identity verification policy (RS256).
jwks_note: In CI, JWKS is sourced inline from oidc_token_generator.py (no network required).
non_claims: This policy does not connect to a real OIDC provider.
CI JWKS is locally generated for testing only.
Production requires an external OIDC provider (Okta, Auth0, Keycloak, Azure AD).
This verifier does not implement OIDC Discovery or JWKS rotation.
